creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to david.keller from comment #20)
oh, I see.  Changes to em(4) have not propagated to the releng/10.1 branch and won't appear in an installable version until 10.2r 

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/releng/10.1/?view=log

vs

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/stable/10/sys/dev/e1000/?view=log


so until 10.2r is out, you could apply r283504 and r284444 to see if the problem goes away for you, and if not apply r284522 and test as well.  Is this something you can do?
